placeholders.moduleSoon: This module will be added in a later phase.

staff.title: Staff accounts
staff.subtitle: Manage cashier accounts and owner profiles.
staff.cannotToggleSelf: You cannot change your own account status here.

form.roleHint: New staff from this screen are always cashiers.
form.tempPasswordHint: Share this password with the cashier. They should change it after first sign-in.

addSheet.title: Add staff
addSheet.description: Create a cashier account with a temporary password.

deleteDialog.title: Delete staff account?
deleteDialog.description: Permanently remove {name} and their sign-in access. This cannot be undone.

errors.invalid_input: Check the form and try again.
errors.email_taken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.auth_create_failed: Could not create the sign-in account.
errors.profile_sync_failed: Account was created but the profile could not be saved.
errors.service_role_unconfigured: Staff management is not configured on the server (missing service role key).
errors.cannot_delete_self: You cannot delete your own account.
errors.cannot_delete_owner: Owner accounts cannot be deleted here.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Manage your catalog, pricing, and stock thresholds.
products.newSubtitle: Create a new catalog item with pricing and optional image.
products.editSubtitle: Update product details. Change quantity with Receive stock under Stock.
products.empty: No products yet. Add your first item to get started.

form.name: Product name
form.skuHint: Suggested from the name — you can edit it.
form.stockReadOnlyHint: Use stock receive to change quantity after the product is created.
form.imageHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF up to 5 MB.

validation.name: Enter a product name.
validation.sku: Enter a valid SKU (letters, numbers, hyphens).

errors.invalid_input: Check the form and try again.
errors.sku_taken: This SKU is already in use.
errors.image_invalid_type: Use JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF.
errors.image_too_large: Image must be 5 MB or smaller.

receive.title: Receive stock
receive.subtitle: Record incoming inventory from a supplier. Stock and cost price update when you submit.
receive.success: Stock received successfully. You can add another receive below.

form.referenceHint: Assigned automatically when you submit (e.g. REC-0001).

lines.title: Line items
lines.subtitle: Search products and add one or more lines to this receive.
lines.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or SKU (min. 2 characters)
lines.noResults: No active products match your search.
lines.empty: No products added yet. Search above to add lines.

errors.invalid_input: Check the form and add at least one product line.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to receive stock.
errors.no_items: Add at least one product line.
errors.product_not_found: One or more products are missing or inactive.
errors.invalid_quantity: Enter a valid quantity for each line.
errors.invalid_unit_cost: Enter a valid unit cost for each line.
errors.duplicate_product: Each product can only appear once per receive.
errors.rpc_not_deployed: Stock receive is not set up on the database yet. Run: supabase db push
errors.insert_failed: Could not save the stock receive. Try again.

receives.title: Receive history
receives.subtitle: Past stock receives from suppliers with line-item detail.
receives.empty: No stock receives yet. Record your first receive to see it here.

adjust.title: Adjust stock
adjust.subtitle: Set a new on-hand quantity for a product. A reason is required for every adjustment.
adjust.success: Stock adjusted successfully. You can make another adjustment below.

product.title: Product
product.subtitle: Search and select the product to adjust.
product.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or SKU (min. 2 characters)
product.noResults: No active products match your search.

form.newQuantityHint: Enter the correct on-hand count after your adjustment.
form.deltaHint: Difference between new quantity and current stock.
form.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Damaged items removed, cycle count correction

errors.invalid_input: Select a product, enter a valid quantity, and provide a reason.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to adjust stock.
errors.invalid_quantity: New quantity must be zero or greater.
errors.no_change: New quantity matches current stock — no adjustment needed.
errors.rpc_not_deployed: Stock adjustment is not set up on the database yet. Run: supabase db push
errors.insert_failed: Could not save the adjustment. Try again.

settingsHub.title: Settings
settingsHub.subtitle: Business preferences and staff management.
settingsHub.staffLinkDescription: View staff, add cashiers, and activate or deactivate accounts.

auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your email and password to access your workspace.

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before signing in.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.
errors.samePassword: Pick a password you haven't used here before.

resetEmail.title: Reset password
resetEmail.subtitle: We'll email you a link to choose a new password.
resetEmail.sent: If that email belongs to an account, you'll receive reset instructions shortly.

updatePassword.title: Choose a new password
updatePassword.subtitle: Use a strong password you don't reuse elsewhere.
